People

Federico Insero

PhD Candidate

additive manufacturing · robotic systems · industrial engineering
Areas
additive manufacturing
robotic systems
industrial engineering
Links
PhD StudentsIEIE Minutes 2025

Federico Insero appears in the IEIE PhD documentation of the University of Pavia within Industrial Engineering under the supervision of Hermes Giberti. For this site, his role follows the current RAMSLAB member list provided for the update.

Recent doctoral documentation links his work to robot-assisted additive manufacturing, while earlier minutes refer to the development of a robotic three-dimensional printing system. The profile therefore centers on additive manufacturing processes, robotic manipulation, and industrial simulation workflows.

Department
Department of Industrial and Information Engineering
ai.rams@unipv.it
